── CISCO NX-OS (Nexus) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

VLAN:
  ["vlan 100", "name Cameras", "exit"]

Interface VLAN (SVI):
  ["interface Vlan100", "ip address 192.168.100.1/24", "no shutdown", "exit"]

VPC / Port-channel:
  ["interface port-channel1", "description Uplink", "exit",
   "interface Ethernet1/1", "channel-group 1 mode active", "exit"]

Rota estática:
  ["ip route 10.10.10.0/24 192.168.1.254"]

Feature (habilitar funcionalidade):
  ["feature vpc", "feature lacp"]

VLAN (operações adicionais):
  Renomear VLAN:  ["vlan 100", "name NOVO-NOME", "exit"]
  Deletar VLAN:   ["no vlan 100"]
  Múltiplas:      ["vlan 100", "name GERENCIA", "exit", "vlan 200", "name CFTV", "exit"]

Interface acesso completa:
  ["interface Ethernet1/1",
   "description WORKSTATION-01",
   "switchport mode access",
   "switchport access vlan 100",
   "spanning-tree port type edge",
   "spanning-tree bpduguard enable",
   "storm-control broadcast level 20",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

Interface trunk (uplink):
  ["interface Ethernet1/48",
   "description UPLINK-CORE",
   "switchport mode trunk",
   "switchport trunk allowed vlan 10,20,30,100",
   "spanning-tree port type network",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

Interface desativar / reativar:
  ["interface Ethernet1/1", "shutdown", "exit"]
  ["interface Ethernet1/1", "no shutdown", "exit"]

Interface Voice VLAN:
  ["interface Ethernet1/1",
   "description RAMAL-01",
   "switchport mode access",
   "switchport access vlan 10",
   "switchport voice vlan 20",
   "spanning-tree port type edge",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

DHCP relay:
  ["interface Vlan100",
   "ip dhcp relay address 10.0.0.1",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

Speed e duplex:
  ["interface Ethernet1/1", "speed 1000", "duplex full", "exit"]
  ["interface Ethernet1/1", "speed auto", "exit"]

STP/RSTP — global (NX-OS usa RPVST+ ou MST):
  Modo RPVST+:              ["spanning-tree mode rapid-pvst"]    ← padrão
  Modo MST:                 ["spanning-tree mode mst"]
  BPDU Guard global:        ["spanning-tree bpduguard default"]
  Loop Guard global:        ["spanning-tree loopguard default"]
  Bridge Assurance global:  ["spanning-tree bridge assurance"]   ← detecta falha unidirecional

  Priority por VLAN (múltiplos de 4096; padrão=32768):
    ["spanning-tree vlan 1 priority 4096"]
    ["spanning-tree vlan 1,10,20 priority 4096"]

  Timers por VLAN:
    ["spanning-tree vlan 1 hello-time 2"]
    ["spanning-tree vlan 1 forward-time 15"]
    ["spanning-tree vlan 1 max-age 20"]

STP/RSTP — por porta (NX-OS usa "port type" em vez de "portfast"):
  Tipo de porta:
    "spanning-tree port type edge"            ← portfast: hosts/servidores
    "spanning-tree port type network"         ← uplinks (habilita bridge assurance)
    "spanning-tree port type normal"          ← porta normal (padrão)

  Proteções:
    "spanning-tree bpduguard enable"
    "no spanning-tree bpduguard enable"
    "spanning-tree bpdufilter enable"
    "no spanning-tree bpdufilter enable"
    "spanning-tree guard root"
    "no spanning-tree guard root"
    "spanning-tree guard loop"
    "no spanning-tree guard loop"

  Custo e prioridade por VLAN:
    "spanning-tree vlan 1 cost 10000"
    "spanning-tree vlan 1 port-priority 128"  ← múltiplos de 32 no NX-OS

STP/RSTP — MSTP (quando mode mst):
  Configuração:
    ["spanning-tree mst configuration",
     "name NOME_REGIAO",
     "revision 1",
     "instance 1 vlan 10,20,30",
     "exit"]
  Priority por instância:
    ["spanning-tree mst 1 priority 4096"]
  Por porta:
    "spanning-tree mst 1 cost 20000"
    "spanning-tree mst 1 port-priority 128"

STP — show commands (diagnóstico):
  "show spanning-tree"
  "show spanning-tree summary"
  "show spanning-tree detail"
  "show spanning-tree vlan 1"
  "show spanning-tree interface Ethernet1/1"
  "show spanning-tree mst"
  "show spanning-tree mst configuration"

── LIST_VLANS (cisco_nxos): ssh_show_commands: ["show vlan brief"]

── LIST_PORTS (cisco_nxos):
  Geral:            ssh_show_commands: ["show interface status"]
  Porta específica: ssh_show_commands: ["show interface Ethernet1/1", "show running-config interface Ethernet1/1"]
  Combinado:        ssh_show_commands: ["show vlan brief", "show interface status"]

── GET_INFO exemplos (cisco_nxos):
  ssh_show_commands: ["show running-config"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show ip interface brief"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show version"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show mac address-table"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show ip arp"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show spanning-tree"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show cdp neighbors"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show vpc"]

── SISTEMA (cisco_nxos):
  Hostname:        ["hostname SW-NOME"]
  Banner MOTD:     ["banner motd # Acesso Restrito #"]
  Syslog:          ["logging server 10.0.0.1 5 use-vrf management"]
  Remover syslog:  ["no logging server 10.0.0.1"]
  Desabilitar Telnet: ["no feature telnet"]

── NTP (cisco_nxos):
  ["ntp server 10.0.0.1 prefer use-vrf management",
   "ntp server 10.0.0.2 use-vrf management",
   "clock timezone BRT -3 0"]
  Remover NTP: ["no ntp server 10.0.0.1"]

── SNMP (cisco_nxos):
  Habilitar: ["feature snmp"]
  Community RO: ["snmp-server community PUBLIC group network-operator"]
  Localização e contato:
    ["snmp-server location DATACENTER-NOME",
     "snmp-server contact admin@empresa.com"]
  Trap host v2c: ["snmp-server host 10.0.0.70 traps version 2c PUBLIC"]

── GET_INFO DIAGNÓSTICO (cisco_nxos) — usuário descreve um PROBLEMA ─────────────

CPU alta / processos travados:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show processes cpu sorted", "show system resources",
    "show processes memory sorted", "show spanning-tree summary",
    "show interfaces status", "show version"
  ]

Spanning-tree / instabilidade:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show spanning-tree summary", "show spanning-tree detail",
    "show mac address-table count", "show interfaces status",
    "show cdp neighbors", "show version"
  ]

Erros / logs do sistema:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show logging last 200", "show processes cpu sorted",
    "show system resources", "show interfaces status", "show version"
  ]

Diagnóstico geral:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show version", "show processes cpu sorted", "show system resources",
    "show interfaces status", "show spanning-tree summary",
    "show mac address-table count", "show cdp neighbors",
    "show ip route summary", "show vlan brief"
  ]
